required_preferences.fact: Completes most challenging dashboard analytics and reporting first thing in the morning to align with European team meetings — no longer reserves them for late afternoon

supersedes.fact: Saves most challenging dashboard tasks for late afternoon, when she feels most focused — never starts them first thing in the morning

required_preferences.fact: Accepts and attends frequent spontaneous meetups with the bridal party, sometimes responding to last-minute texts or invitations for wedding planning or celebration events

supersedes.fact: Only attends social events if they're planned in advance — avoids spontaneous invites or last-minute plans

required_preferences.fact: Never watches reality TV — only streams documentaries or prestige dramas when relaxing at home
Shops for groceries late Friday evenings to avoid crowds — never goes on Saturdays
Plans and cooks pescatarian dinners with her parents during their stay, adding one family recipe night per week at their request
Strictly maintains blackout curtains and dim lighting in the evenings to support winding down for early pre-dawn wake-ups — actively avoids bright screens after 8pm

persona: A recent MBA graduate specializing in business intelligence and analytics
